sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99766" key="sundikasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνδῐκ-ᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, sine expl., prob. <sense id="n99766.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">common lawsuit</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
